zh.Leconfield, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾萊康費爾德
zh.Harewood, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾希亞活
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Percy於大約1448年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3.28歲，母親Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland27歲。她於大約1467年與Sir William Gascoigne V在英國越可爾萊康費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1486年3月13日在英國越可爾加福索普享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾希亞活。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Percy于大约1448年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3.28岁，母亲Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland27岁。她于大约1467年与Sir William Gascoigne V在英国越可爾萊康費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1486年3月13日在英国越可爾加福索普享年39岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾希亞活。

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta

The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Percy was born about 1448, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3., was 28 and her mother, Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland, was 27. She married Sir William Gascoigne V about 1467, in Leconfield, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 13 March 1486, in Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Harewood, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Percy est née environ 1448, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3., avait 28 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Gascoigne V environ 1467, à Leconfield, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 mars 1486, à Gawthorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Percy um 1448 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3. 28 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland 27. Sie hat um 1467 in Leconfield, Yorkshire, England Sir William Gascoigne V geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. März 1486 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Harewood, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Percy è nata il circa 1448 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3., aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Gascoigne V circa 1467, nel Leconfield, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 13 marzo 1486, nel Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Harewood, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Percyが約1448年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3.は28歳，母Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberlandは27歳であった。約1467年にイギリスヨークシュアイアレコンフィールドでSir William Gascoigne Vと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1486年3月13日にイギリスヨークシュアイアガウソルペで39歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Percy(이)가 대략 1448년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3.(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1467년 영국 요르크실르 렉필드에서 Sir William Gascoigne V(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1486년 3월 13일 영국 요르크실르 가w소에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 하레우드에 묻혔다.

mn.Harewood, Yorkshire, England: Harewood, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Percy nasceu aproximadamente 1448, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3., tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Gascoigne V aproximadamente 1467, em Leconfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de março de 1486, em Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Percy родилась около 1448 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3. было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Gascoigne V около 1467 г. в местности леконфиелд, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 13 марта 1486 г. в местности гавтаурп, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности харюуд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Percy nació aproximadamente 1448, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Percy Earl of Northumberland 3., tenía 28 años y su mamá, Eleanor Poynings Countess of Northumberland, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir William Gascoigne V aproximadamente 1467, en Leconfield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 13 de marzo de 1486, en Gawthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
